## ⚙️ Chore / Maintenance — The PR Inquisition

### Summary

<!-- What maintenance task does this PR address? e.g., dependency update, CI fix, refactor, script improvement -->

### 🔮 Type of Change

- [ ] Dependency update
- [ ] CI/CD pipeline change
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] Script or tooling update
- [ ] Configuration change

### Impact Assessment

<!-- What systems does this change affect? Any risk of regression? -->

- **Risk level**: <!-- Low / Medium / High -->
- **Systems affected**: <!-- e.g., "Build pipeline only" or "All EF Core migrations" -->

### 🧪 Validation

- [ ] Existing tests still pass
- [ ] CI pipeline verified (if applicable)
- [ ] No behavior changes introduced

### 📜 The Antigravity Pacts

- [ ] "Automation is Documentation" — my new steps are scripted.
- [ ] My changes pass the local Inquisition (`scripts/test-local.ps1`).
- [ ] I have run `dotnet format` and verified no style violations.
